description_long: This is a low-polygon stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated, angular limbs and a simplified human form. The figure is depicted in a dynamic, mid-air pose, with both arms raised and legs spread wide, suggesting a leaping or acrobatic motion. The head is small and blocky, with a distinct separation from the torso, and the facial features are minimalistic. The clothing consists of a short-sleeved top and wide-legged pants, both rendered in flat, solid colors. The shoes are blocky and match the stylized aesthetic of the rest of the figure. The overall appearance is abstract and geometric, with sharp edges and a faceted surface.
description: A stylized, low-poly adult pedestrian in a dynamic leaping pose, wearing a short-sleeved top and wide-legged pants. The figure is angular and abstract, with minimal facial features and blocky shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, outstretched arms, and wide-legged stance, with clear visibility of the torso and head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended arm and leg, with the head and torso profile visible and the dynamic pose emphasized.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with the arms raised and the back of the clothing visible.
description_view_3: Oblique view from behind, showing the side and back of the figure, with one arm and leg more prominent.
attribute_posture: leaping with arms raised and legs spread
